title: Food and nutrition legislation, guidelines and policies: Regulatory initiatives - Canada.ca
content:
## Food and nutrition legislation, guidelines and policies: Regulatory initiatives
- Regulatory  initiatives
This section lists the regulatory initiatives related to food and nutrition at Health Canada, including:
- marketing authorizations
- incorporation by reference
- modernizing Canada's food regulations Final publication of the Regulations Amending Certain Regulations Concerning Food Additives and Compositional Standards, Microbiological Criteria and Methods of Analysis for Food [2024-12-18]
- Final publication of the Regulations Amending Certain Regulations Concerning Food Additives and Compositional Standards, Microbiological Criteria and Methods of Analysis for Food [2024-12-18]
- notices of proposal and notices of modification
- lists of foods that have received temporary marketing authorization letters
- Canada's       Food and Drugs Act and Regulations
For information about planned and anticipated regulatory changes, visit the forward regulatory plan .
Learn more about upcoming and ongoing consultations on proposed federal regulations:
- Consulting with Canadians
- Amendments to the Food and Drugs Act (Bill C-38)
